sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15640" key="a)rtidah/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτι-δᾰής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n15640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">just taught,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.227</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
